title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: OHRA EMERGENCY SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an overnight winter shelter with limited availability of 25 beds. 2350 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Open 24 hours a day when temperatures drop 32 degrees or below (541) 631-2235 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 631-2235 Main phone Opportunities for Housing Resources and Assistance Main phone (541) 631-2235 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; first-come, first-served basis FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
